_fixture_meta.label: negative
_fixture_meta.notes: USD Coin (USDC) on Solana. Has active freeze authority (7dGbd2QZcCKcTndnHcTL8q7SMVXAkp688NTQYwrRCrar — Circle's compliance authority). This is the canonical negative example demonstrating that freeze authority ALONE does not make a token a honeypot: USDC has freeze authority for regulatory compliance (OFAC blacklisting) but is jup_verified=true, jup_strict=true, score=1. Expected: static signal fires for freeze_authority_active at low weight (0.25 contribution) → confidence ~0.25 from static path. Simulation expected to PASS (sells work). The scoring crate should ultimately discount this via jup_verified and score=1 contextual signals. This fixture validates that the static signal fires but is correctly attenuated. Developer note: confidence should not exceed 0.30 for a jup_strict token with score=1.
